item.title: Was chillin' with the wife the other daaay
item.description:
Reached out to check-in, we met for a playdate once
They went to stay with a neighbor one bad night, neighbor thought they were helping...
You wonder why more women dont go to shelters? this is why...
the lesser of two evils is.... the devil.
we offered them our basement apartment.
"property" by another name...
Resistance is futile, you will be assimilated... into this family.
Car is now securable and weather-proof.
USDA grade A pig anus
"...you found a family of angels." Meh, of the Morningstar variety perhaps. But whateves...
why a spoon, cousin?
Blocked, deleted.
She's been ready for this, just needed help with that first step.
No expectatons asked. Just heal, and be respectful.
(prior to the blocking). It warmed the cocklers of my black heart watching him unhinge.
A sacrifice was made, but I can afford it. We can afford this easily
[insert philosoraptor] If one has the means to intervene and does nothing are they complicite in the act? Abetting through Aquiescence. "The student once asked the wise master "Why did god create atheists?". To whch the master replied "To show christians what true compassion looks like. The atheist is kind for kindness's sake, for they have no heavenly reward to look forward to" Be excellent to each other.
item.dc:creator: SkronkieGrossburgers

item.title: It's been a weird 12 months
item.description: It's small, but it's mine. Edit: Thanks for all the kind words people. Send cat photos. My ex and I had two cats and I am missing them.

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
haven't watched much of that show.. thought she was funny in 40 year old virgin though.. greetings online friends
dude parties
just one reason i stopped drinking
dogs love doing that
this has tripped many of us up in the past
sure why not
mmm hmm
there are other, better and more child appropriate bird men
Maryland is a hater
air conditioning feels good
i can see myself doing this
i'd wear that
my body doesn't like all of my favorite ways to sit, recline, and sleep
i don't really want to be that deep in the ocean tbh
it's traditional
every time
if there's one thing that could do it... definitely a pc
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Top Science News of the Week March 11 - 17, 2024
item.description: Sauce (Source) 1. Long covid https://www.sciencenews.org/article/long-covid-brain-fog-blood-brain-barrier-damage Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.nature.com/articles/s41593-024-01576-9 2. Nasal rinsing https://www.healthline.com/health-news/cdc-reports-deadly-amoeba-infection-due-to-nasal-rinsing-with-untreated-tap-water Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://wwwnc.cdc.gov/eid/article/30/4/23-1076_article 3. 2D materials https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/03/240314145302.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.adj6556 4.Memorization https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/03/240312182752.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2311077121 5. Drinking bird toy generator https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/03/240314122109.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.cell.com/device/fulltext/S2666-9986(24)00108-X

item.title: Anthony Bourdain Pencil Portrait
item.description: “Wherever you go, there will always be a certain number of genuine artists, skilled craftsmen or honorable journeymen. Then there will always be the pretenders and the knuckleheads who’ll get weeded out in the end. Either that or they learn. A lot of great chefs have made a lot of bad food in their lives while they figured out what they’re good at. But there’s no excuse for consistently bad food. Cynical food. Food without pride, you know, where you just say, ‘Fuck it, I’ll give them what they want.’ You start off making CITIZEN KANE and end up making ERNEST GOES TO CAMP.” –Anthony Bourdain I posted this piece I completed a couple months back and felt like sharing it again for Art Crawl. Thanks again IMGUR. Anthony Bourdain 2024 Pencil and Graphite on Bristolboard 11x14 inches
item.dc:creator: LloydThompson2024
